Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to generate an updated DECLARE model with added constraints that mitigate bias The instructions mention Identify Potential Bias and Add New Constraints to Mitigate Bias They give examples like coexistence of ManualReview for sensitive applicants response succession constraints requiring BiasMitigationCheck before decisions after sensitive attribute checks and non succession constraints preventing direct succession from sensitive attribute event to decision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to produce a final answer containing Updated declare_model dictionary as valid Python code A short explanation

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We must decide on specific activities and constraints The given model has activities StartApplication FinalDecision RequestAdditionalInfo It does not include sensitive attribute activities or manual review etc So we may need to introduce new activities

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: To mitigate bias we might need to refer to activities that are part of the process like checking sensitive attributes Since they are not in the initial model it is okay to add them as keys in constraints because constraints define relationships among activities

Name: Validation - PE
Text: The instruction says Your task is to take the initial DECLARE model and add new constraints that limit the process bias It does not say we cannot add new activity names

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We will add constraints using plausible activity names CheckSensitiveAttributes BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: For bias mitigation we could enforce that after CheckDemographicAttributes a BiasMitigationCheck must happen before any FinalDecision That would ensure that no matter what decision there is a bias check in between

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After checking race gender or age the system or human might immediately reject without proper evaluation Thus we could add Non succession from CheckSensitiveAttributes to FinalDecision Prevent immediate decision after seeing sensitive attributes forcing an intermediate step

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Chain response from CheckSensitiveAttributes to ManualReview if sensitive attributes are checked a manual review must immediately follow

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Succession from ManualReview to FinalDecision ensures ManualReview is followed by FinalDecision and FinalDecision is preceded by it

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We could also add existence for new activities to ensure they are part of process mandatory collection and human review for all applications That is a clear bias mitigating measure

Name: Validation - PE
